A true triple-threat, Caden competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, a doubles best of #2, a mixed doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

Career highlights: U.S. Selection Event top-3 (U15 XD) • Junior Nationals top-4 (BD U15) • ORC top-2 finisher.

Caden has shown remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 21 different players:
  • Jessica Wu — a trusted U15/XD partner (8 events, best: #3)
  • Rocky Yang — a trusted BD/U15 partner (6 events, best: #2)
  • Ansen Liu — a trusted BD/U17 partner (6 events, best: #5)

Caden has been on this journey through U15, U17, U19 — a multi-age-group career that few can match, accumulating invaluable experience at every level. That depth of competitive history is an asset younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Caden has competed across 5 different regions (NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel the country and test the game against diverse competition from coast to coast.

With 6 seasons of competitive experience and 1 title, Caden is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to dedication, talent, and love for the game.

cyrus_cai.name: Cyrus Cai
cyrus_cai.summary:
Out of New York, Cyrus Cai is just getting started on the junior circuit with 2 tournament entries. Every champion's story has a beginning, and this is Cyrus's.

Cyrus competes in both singles and doubles, developing the kind of well-rounded game that pays dividends as competition intensifies at higher levels.

cyrus_m_cai.name: Cyrus M Cai
cyrus_m_cai.summary:
Representing New York, Cyrus M Cai has claimed a championship, currently competing at the U13 level, a moment that separates contenders from champions. With 28 entries across 12 tournaments, the competitive foundation is built — and more titles are within reach.

Notably, Cyrus has entered higher age groups at 1 tournament, voluntarily taking on older competition — a bold move that reveals both confidence and a hunger for growth.

What makes Cyrus especially formidable is the versatility across all three disciplines — boasting 1 singles title, a doubles best of #3. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

Career highlights: U.S. Selection Event participant (3 entries).

Cyrus has shown remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 8 different players:
  • Tailong Cheng — a trusted BD partner (7 events, best: #3)

Cyrus has competed at both U11 and U13, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as competition grows fiercer with each age group.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NE, South, Cyrus isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 3 seasons of competitive experience, Cyrus brings tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court against the best.
